nodes.label: Unit tests for log_sanitizer utility functions.
Test masking a simple dict containing API_KEY.
Test masking a simple dict containing PASSWORD.
Test masking a simple dict containing SECRET.
Test masking a simple dict containing TOKEN.
Test masking environment variable format with 'value' field.
Test masking environment variable format with 'value_from' field.
Test masking environment variable format with 'valueFrom' field.
Test that non-sensitive env vars are not masked.
Test masking with additional custom sensitive keys.
Test that primitive types are returned unchanged.
Test masking a complex nested structure.
Test that masking creates a copy and doesn't modify the original.
Test masking various sensitive key patterns.
Test masking a list of environment variables.
Test detection of SECRET in key names.
Test detection of TOKEN in key names.
Test detection of PASSWORD in key names.
Test detection of API + KEY pattern.
Test detection of ACCESS + KEY pattern.
Test detection of PRIVATE + KEY pattern.
Test detection of LICENSE + KEY pattern.
Test that non-sensitive keys are not detected.
Test detection of custom extra keys.
Test that extra keys matching is case-insensitive.
Test keys with special characters are handled correctly.
Test that empty keys are not considered sensitive.
Test that both tokens are required for pair patterns.
Test tokenizing camelCase keys (no splitting on case changes).
Test tokenizing keys with multiple separator types.
Test tokenizing strings with only special characters.
Test tokenizing keys with consecutive separators.
Test that function returns True when both tokens are present.
Test that function returns False when first token is missing.
Test that function returns False when second token is missing.
Test that function returns False when both tokens are missing.
Test that function returns False for empty token set.
Test with exact token set matching required tokens.
Test that token order doesn't matter.
Test with additional tokens beyond the required pair.
Test all the key pair patterns used in the code.
